---
name: "revise-blog-post"
description: "Tighten an existing portfolio blog post without losing the original voice."
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "[post path or slug] [what should improve]"
---

Revise an existing blog post in this portfolio.

Use:

- [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md)
- [portfolio-editorial skill](../skills/portfolio-editorial/SKILL.md)
- [blog-html instructions](../instructions/blog-html.instructions.md)

Priorities:

- remove repetition
- sharpen summary and conclusion
- improve linking quality
- keep the author's voice intact
- preserve structural metadata

If the revision changes the summary, cover, or publish-facing metadata, regenerate site metadata and validate the site.
